message:
feat(server): add fr-server crate with minimal main() bootstrap (bd-zuyq.2.1)

Create the dedicated FrankenRedis server binary target that composes
existing library crates into a real process entry point.

New crate: crates/fr-server
- Binary name: frankenredis
- Dependencies: fr-runtime, fr-config, fr-protocol
- Minimal CLI: --port <N>, --mode strict|hardened, --help
- Constructs Runtime with chosen policy (defaults to hardened)
- Placeholder stdin inline-command loop for smoke-testing the
  bootstrap path (converts space-separated input to RESP arrays,
  dispatches through Runtime::execute_frame)
- Real TCP listener deferred to bd-zuyq.3.1

Tests (2):
- server_bootstrap_creates_runtime: verifies Runtime constructs
  successfully in both strict and hardened modes
- server_bootstrap_processes_ping: sends RESP-encoded PING command,
  verifies PONG response

Workspace: added "crates/fr-server" to workspace members.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
